Header files for CMSIS Cortex-M and SC cores, including peripheral access, DSP functions, and core instructions.


## Files
- **[arm_common_tables.h](arm_common_tables.h.md)**: Extern declarations for common tables like bit reversal and twiddle factors for DSP on Cortex-M processors.
- **[arm_const_structs.h](arm_const_structs.h.md)**: Constant structs for various lengths of CFFT instances for Cortex-M4/M3 processors.
- **[arm_math.h](arm_math.h.md)**: Provides signal processing functions for Cortex-M devices, including filters, transforms, and interpolation.
- **[cmsis_armcc.h](cmsis_armcc.h.md)**: Header file for CMSIS Cortex-M core functions and instructions, including register access and intrinsics.
- **[cmsis_armcc_V6.h](cmsis_armcc_V6.h.md)**: Header file for CMSIS Cortex-M core functions and instructions, including register access and intrinsics.
- **[cmsis_gcc.h](cmsis_gcc.h.md)**: Header file for CMSIS Cortex-M core functions and instructions, including register access and intrinsics.
- **[core_cm0.h](core_cm0.h.md)**: CMSIS Cortex-M0 core peripheral access layer header file with register and function definitions.
- **[core_cm0plus.h](core_cm0plus.h.md)**: CMSIS Cortex-M0+ core peripheral access layer header file for ARM compilers.
- **[core_cm3.h](core_cm3.h.md)**: CMSIS Cortex-M3 core peripheral access layer header file with register definitions and NVIC functions.
- **[core_cm4.h](core_cm4.h.md)**: CMSIS Cortex-M4 core peripheral access layer header file with definitions and functions for core registers and NVIC.
- **[core_cm7.h](core_cm7.h.md)**: CMSIS Cortex-M7 core peripheral access layer header file with definitions and functions for NVIC, SysTick, and cache management.
- **[core_cmFunc.h](core_cmFunc.h.md)**: Header file for CMSIS Cortex-M core function access, supporting multiple compilers.
- **[core_cmInstr.h](core_cmInstr.h.md)**: CMSIS Cortex-M core instruction access header for various compilers.
- **[core_cmSimd.h](core_cmSimd.h.md)**: Header file for CMSIS Cortex-M SIMD intrinsics, supporting various compilers.
- **[core_sc000.h](core_sc000.h.md)**: CMSIS SC000 core peripheral access layer header file for ARM Cortex secure core.
- **[core_sc300.h](core_sc300.h.md)**: CMSIS SC300 core peripheral access layer header file for ARM Cortex-M processors, defining core registers and functions.
